"'''So You Think You Wanna Be a Rebel Pilot?'''" was an article that first appeared in [[Star Wars Kids (1997) 4|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997) 4]]. It featured interviews with [[William Hootkins]], [[Ian Liston]], [[Jeremy Sinden]], and [[Denis Lawson]].
